Deana Hardyng is a noblewoman of House Hardyng and the wife of Walton Frey. They have three children: Steffon, Walda, and Bryan Frey.[1]

Family[ ]

Deana's relation to Ser Harrold Hardyng, the heir to the Vale, is unknown.
